scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme (IGNWPS)
eligibility_criteria: Must be a widow aged 40 or above, living below the poverty line.
benefit_summary: Financial assistance of ₹300/month (varies by state) to widows below the poverty line.
application_steps: Visit the nearest Gram Panchayat or Block Office.
Obtain the IGNWPS application form.
Fill the form and attach the required documents.
Submit to the Social Welfare Department officer.

eligibility_criteria: Unorganized sector workers aged 18-40 years with a monthly income of ₹15,000 or less.
required_documents: Savings Bank Account / Jan Dhan Account with IFSC
benefit_summary: Assured monthly pension of ₹3000 after attaining the age of 60 years.
application_steps: Visit nearest Common Service Centre (CSC).
Carry Aadhaar and Bank account details.
Make the initial contribution amount in cash to the Village Level Entrepreneur (VLE).

eligibility_criteria: Adult women belonging to BPL households with no existing LPG connection.
benefit_summary: Provides a deposit-free LPG connection to women from BPL households.
application_steps: Download the application form from PMUY website or collect it from nearest LPG distributor.
Fill the form and submit it at the LPG distributor office.
Document verification will be done before issuing connection.

eligibility_criteria: Economically weaker sections or lower income groups needing housing assistance.
benefit_summary: Credit linked subsidy scheme for buying or building a pucca house.
application_steps: Apply online on PMAY portal or through CSCs.
Fill application with Aadhaar details.
Apply for home loan at banks/HFCs claiming PMAY subsidy.

eligibility_criteria: All landholding farmers' families having cultivable land.
benefit_summary: Income support of ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments.
application_steps: Visit PM Kisan portal and click on 'New Farmer Registration'.
Enter Aadhaar number and fill the required details.
Submit for approval by state nodal officers.

eligibility_criteria: Students from minority communities or economically weaker sections pursuing higher education.
benefit_summary: Financial assistance covering tuition fees and maintenance allowance for students.
application_steps: Register on the National Scholarship Portal.
Fill the application form with personal and academic details.
Upload required documents and submit for institution verification.

scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
eligibility_criteria: Citizens aged 60 years or above belonging to a BPL household.
benefit_summary: Monthly pension of ₹200 to ₹500 depending on age and state contributions.
application_steps: Collect application form from the Social Welfare Department or Block Office.
Submit the filled form with age and income proofs.
Approval is done at the district or panchayat level.

eligibility_criteria: Persons with disabilities needing rehabilitation services.
benefit_summary: Financial assistance provided through NGOs for education, vocational training, and rehabilitation of disabled persons.
application_steps: Identify a local NGO funded under DDRS.
Register with the NGO for required rehabilitation services.
Provide necessary documents like disability certificate.
